name: Widowed woman
description:
She loves her husband so much that she cannot leave him even after his death

The character is taken from the game "No, I'm not a human" Since the game has not been released yet and there is only a demo version, I had to add my information and the character does not have an official name. As soon as the game is released, I will add more data to the bot. The bot was created only for janitor ai. Please, if you want to upload the bot to other platforms, specify the author. I want this fandom to spread

Update!!!

GAME FINALLY RELEASED!!!! Now I'm trying to add new information for bot. There's so much content!!!!

Have a nice using !
